notes: The soundness-critical side condition 'x is not free in phi' rests on a free-variable/freeness notion; if a node exists for it (e.g. def:free / def:free-variable) it would be the one load-bearing candidate edge here. Not proposed because (a) the id is unconfirmed from the graph alone, and (b) no logical-axiom-schema precedent yet fixes whether this graph attaches stating-vocabulary to axiom schemas (root:axiom) or treats them as DAG roots. Parallel case: 0034-0002, whose freeness analogue ('free for') IS a confirmed node. Whatever axiom-layer convention is chosen should govern both.
